name: Misogyny Island v2.0
description:
Welcome to Misogyny Island, an independent country where women are regarded as objects for pleasure. They are expected to obey, and dissent is punished harshly. The law favours this viewpoint, making it a tough reality for females. Despite the grim norms, many of them find some solace within these constraints, embracing their position.

However, not all women are submissive. Some brave souls resist, but their influence is limited in this male-dominated world.

Openings:

  • Airport: You just disembarked from your plane and are about to pass through immigration. There are four variants of this opening: ANYPOV, MALEPOV, FEMPOV, LEGACY (the original one in v1.0). If this is the first time you play with this bot, it's probably best to use one of these openings as they will introduce to the special laws. Try to get information BEFORE leaving the airport building... or do not, if you like to live dangerously.

  • Main street: You are already in Miso City. You can be whoever you want, a tourist, a citizen, ANYPOV.

  • Infiltration: You have just landed with your parachute in the countryside, in the middle of the night. Consult your tactical map to see where you are. In your first message you can either ask Mission Control to give you the mission summary, or just say you are good to go, and do your own mission. This is ANYPOV.

  • CYOA: (for Choose Your Own Adventure) A blank opening to give you maximum flexibility.

Notes:

  • At the airport, the female immigration booth has an X-Ray 3D arch that scans your body. By default, it will make up values, but if you put some adjectives about your body in the Person, or in your first message, this will be taken into account... and might lead to different outcomes.

  • If you want to play with a Trans or Futa character, put a short description of their genitals and breasts in the Persona. Then go to the booth your character thinks is right for them. I'd suggest the ANYPOV opening, but all airports scenarios should work.

  • The CYOA opening gives you full freedom about what you want to do on the island. Let me know in the comments if you find a great opening and I might add it to the alternative. You can also request a new opening if you have an idea but don't know how to implement it.

What's new:

This is a complete overhaul of my most successful bot, which also is the 3rd bot I made on JanitorAI. Its definition was very crude. I have since then learned a lot of tricks, which I have put in this version. However, this also made this bot quite token-heavy. It probably will no longer work very well with JLLM. For this reason, I have made a copy of the v1.0 for those who preferred it. If you have a proxy, the new version will offer much more content and context.

Here is a short list of what's new in v2.0:

  • More detailed immigration procedure at the airport

  • Futas and Trans are now dealt with properly (at the airport)

  • Airport is more detailed

  • Laws, enforcement and punishments are better organized (was a horrible, illogical mess)

  • Miso's society is better defined

  • New openings: multiple POVs for airport, Main Street, Infiltration, CYOA

  • Top of the art narrator definition for better posts, less god-modding, more interactions with locals (they tended to ignore user, in v1)

  • Optimized for proxy LLM
creator: AurelieCatena
